findings: Worker queue/claimed/results/log paths are coherent between launcher prompts and README, including atomic `.tmp-` result guidance.
Commander progress paths (swarm-state.json, child-agents.jsonl) align with README, but bundle.json/result-copy handoff path is not documented in README.
Partial/failed bundle status is prompt-driven; monitor focuses on results/*.json and may miss commander-local bundle issues if results copy is absent.
